context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel game
context.role: Background wall of cage interior, fills entire screen
adjacent_elements: All game elements render on top of this
context.usage_scenario: Always visible, provides warm home environment feeling. Static, never changes.

visual_specification.texture: Flat solid color, no pattern or texture

animation.description: No animation. Single solid color fill.

visual_specification.details: Simple cream-colored (#FFF1E8) background representing interior wall of cage. No decorative elements, wallpaper, or patterns. Provides neutral backdrop for Echo and other elements.

relationships.shared_with: Color palette with all environment elements
relationships.differences_from: floor: lighter cream vs darker tan. cage_bars: solid vs bars. Simplest asset in game.

explicit_negations: No wood grain or material texture
Color does not change based on time or state
